Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.data

Interface IEnergyAnchorData

  • public interface IEnergyAnchorData
    Configuration for the anchor point of an energy ability projectile. Controls where the projectile spawns relative to the caster.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getAnchor()  
      float getAnchorOffsetX()  
      float getAnchorOffsetY()  
      float getAnchorOffsetZ()  
      boolean getLaunchFromAnchor()  
      void setAnchor​(int anchor)
      Set the anchor point.
      void setAnchorOffsetX​(float anchorOffsetX)  
      void setAnchorOffsetY​(float anchorOffsetY)  
      void setAnchorOffsetZ​(float anchorOffsetZ)  
      void setLaunchFromAnchor​(boolean launchFromAnchor)  

    • Method Detail

      • getAnchor

        int getAnchor()
        Returns:
        Anchor point ordinal (0=FRONT, 1=CENTER, 2=RIGHT_HAND, 3=LEFT_HAND, 4=ABOVE_HEAD, 5=CHEST, 6=EYE).

      • setAnchor

        void setAnchor​(int anchor)
        Set the anchor point.
        Parameters:
        anchor - Anchor ordinal (0=FRONT, 1=CENTER, 2=RIGHT_HAND, 3=LEFT_HAND, 4=ABOVE_HEAD, 5=CHEST, 6=EYE)

      • getAnchorOffsetX

        float getAnchorOffsetX()
        Returns:
        X offset from the anchor point (positive = right).

      • setAnchorOffsetX

        void setAnchorOffsetX​(float anchorOffsetX)
        Parameters:
        anchorOffsetX - X offset from anchor (positive = right).

      • getAnchorOffsetY

        float getAnchorOffsetY()
        Returns:
        Y offset from the anchor point (positive = up).

      • setAnchorOffsetY

        void setAnchorOffsetY​(float anchorOffsetY)
        Parameters:
        anchorOffsetY - Y offset from anchor (positive = up).

      • getAnchorOffsetZ

        float getAnchorOffsetZ()
        Returns:
        Z offset from the anchor point (positive = forward).

      • setAnchorOffsetZ

        void setAnchorOffsetZ​(float anchorOffsetZ)
        Parameters:
        anchorOffsetZ - Z offset from anchor (positive = forward).

      • getLaunchFromAnchor

        boolean getLaunchFromAnchor()
        Returns:
        Whether the projectile launches from the anchor position instead of the default eye/look-vector position.

      • setLaunchFromAnchor

        void setLaunchFromAnchor​(boolean launchFromAnchor)
        Parameters:
        launchFromAnchor - When true, the projectile launches from its anchor position; when false, it snaps to the default eye/look-vector position.
